# cloudtemple_vpc_private_network (Data Source)

Used to retrieve a specific private network.

To query this datasource you will need the `vpc_read` role.

## Example Usage

```terraform
data "cloudtemple_vpc_private_network" "example" {
  id = "c229c411-ac30-4caa-9c67-70d4c230d0ee"
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `id` (String) The ID of the private network to retrieve.

### Read-Only

- `ip_address` (String) The IP network address in CIDR notation.
- `name` (String) The name of the private network.
- `static_ip_count` (Number) The number of static IPs configured for this private network.
- `vlan_id` (Number) The VLAN ID of the private network.
- `vpc_id` (String) The ID of the VPC this private network belongs to.
